rules:
When friendly Bulk Landers are launched to this Dropsite, they ignore enemy Battalions on this Dropsite.
After enemy Battalions are deployed to this Dropsite, roll a dice for each of those Battalions. For each result of a 3+, remove one of those Battalions. Only one Infestation Bastion can be used this way for each Battalion and any Battalions already on the Dropsite are ignored.
